items.raw_desc: Kártyajáték UNO Liars:                Prolhejte to victoryUNO Liars is a variation of the popular card game. Your job will be to lie while bluffing so that others can't tell what you're really thinking. The deck of cards includes special cards that are played face down and the player announces what is on them. Others will think about whether he is telling the truth or lying. If someone challenges him and exposes the lie, the liar must take the card. If, on the other hand, he was telling the truth, the challenger must take the card. The principle of the game otherwise remains the same as you know from the classic UNO game, and of course you must not forget to shout "Uno" in the case of one remaining card! items.raw_desc: Kártyajáték Dino 3-2-1 Stitch:Stitch will test your observationThe Dino 3-2-1 Stitch game is suitable for the whole family and will thoroughly test your observation. All players play at the same time and sometimes it can be a mess. Each player starts with 5 cards in hand. The object of the game is to have 5 cards of the same rank.  The moderator counts down 3-2-1, your job is to pick a card that doesn't fit and send it to the player on your left. He takes it and decides whether it's good for him or whether he'll send it on. Players send cards over and over again. Those who get five of a kind grab a chip (rocket), and then other players try to grab chips. A player who has no chips left is immediately eliminated from the game. The last one to stay in the game wins. Az acél tartósságával és hosszú élettartamával emelkedik ki a többi anyag közül. A buliban remekül fognak mutatni a frissítő falatok, mert a tojásszeletelővel lenyűgözően díszítheted a szendvicseket vagy a tálakat.
